hooks.command:
/bin/sh -c 'root="${1-}"; shift; if [ -z "$root" ]; then printf "%s
" "mobius:hook-misconfigured: PLUGIN_ROOT missing" >&2; exit 2; fi; launcher="$root/scripts/mobius_hook_launcher.sh"; if [ ! -f "$launcher" ]; then if [ ! -d "$root" ]; then case "$root" in */.codex/plugins/cache/*/mobius/*) printf "%s
" "mobius:hook-unavailable: installed plugin cache missing" >&2; exit 0 ;; esac; printf "%s
" "mobius:hook-misconfigured: PLUGIN_ROOT path missing" >&2; exit 2; fi; printf "%s
" "mobius:hook-corrupt-install: scripts/mobius_hook_launcher.sh missing" >&2; exit 2; fi; exec /bin/sh "$launcher" "$root" "$@"' mobius-hook "${PLUGIN_ROOT}" hook pre-tool-use

/bin/sh -c 'root="${1-}"; shift; if [ -z "$root" ]; then printf "%s
" "mobius:hook-misconfigured: PLUGIN_ROOT missing" >&2; exit 2; fi; launcher="$root/scripts/mobius_hook_launcher.sh"; if [ ! -f "$launcher" ]; then if [ ! -d "$root" ]; then case "$root" in */.codex/plugins/cache/*/mobius/*) printf "%s
" "mobius:hook-unavailable: installed plugin cache missing" >&2; exit 0 ;; esac; printf "%s
" "mobius:hook-misconfigured: PLUGIN_ROOT path missing" >&2; exit 2; fi; printf "%s
" "mobius:hook-corrupt-install: scripts/mobius_hook_launcher.sh missing" >&2; exit 2; fi; exec /bin/sh "$launcher" "$root" "$@"' mobius-hook "${PLUGIN_ROOT}" hook stop
